text:
C. Eye Drops and Topical Ointments 

The administration of eye drops and topical ointments does not require the skills of a 
nurse. Therefore, even if the administration of eye drops or ointments is necessary to the 
treatment of an illness or injury and the patient cannot self-administer the drops, and 
there is no one available to administer them, the visits cannot be covered as a skilled 
nursing service. This section does not eliminate coverage for skilled nursing visits for 
observation
